description: Move authorization from routes to database queries loses multi-tenant isolation
diff_summary: Moved org_id filtering from explicit route parameter to conditional logic in get_documents based on user role

edge_cases: If user.role check fails (None, unexpected value), query falls through with no org filter — returns all documents from all orgs; role string case sensitivity ('Superadmin' vs 'superadmin') bypasses restriction
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Explicit org_id parameter was safe by default — caller must supply it; new role-based conditional is secure by exception — requires correct role check; any code calling get_documents(org_id=None) now returns all documents
ground_truth.next_prompt: In testing I'm seeing documents from other organizations appearing in the list
ground_truth.notes: Secure-by-default replaced by secure-by-exception — multi-tenant isolation at risk
